23814.title: First Occurrence of One
23814.description: Find the index of the first occurrence of the number 1 in a sorted binary array containing only 0s and 1s. If 1 is not present, return -1.

267.title: Trapping Rain Water
267.description: Given an array of n non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining.

303.title: Next Greater Element
303.description: Given an array, find the Next Greater Element (NGE) for every element. The NGE for an element x is the first greater element on its right. If no greater element exists, output -1.
